chunks.text: The fellowships listed below are for U.S. citizens and permanent residents unless otherwise noted. In addition, the Graduate Division also maintains its own fellowship website. Apple scholarships for Berkeley EECS students. Apple Masters Scholarship in Integrated Systems.
chunks.question: Who are the fellowships primarily for?

chunks.text: National Science Foundation (NSF) Graduate Research Fellowship Program. GRF Operations Center, Suite 600, 1818 N Street NW, Washington, DC 20036. Eligible Degree Programs: M.S. and Ph.D. Fastlane Application Phone: 866-673-4737. E-mail: info@nsfgrfp.org. Homepage: https://www.fastlane.nsf.gov/grfp.
chunks.question: Which degrees are eligible for NSF fellowships?

chunks.text: National Defense Science and Engineering Graduate (NDSEG) Fellowships. DoD NDSEG Fellowship Program Office, One Research Court, Suite 360, Rockville, MD 20850. Eligible Degree Programs: all graduate engineering programs. Phone: (202) 331-3516. Fax: (202) 265-8504. E-mail: ndseg@asee.org. Homepage: http://www.asee.org/ndseg. ASEE Graduate Fellowships: http://www.asee.org/fellowship-programs/graduate.
chunks.question: What degrees qualify for NDSEG fellowships?

chunks.text: Semiconductor Research Corporation (SRC) Fellowship. Semiconductor Research Corporation, Graduate Fellowship Program, P.O. Box 12053, Research Triangle Park, NC 27709-2053. Eligible Degree Program: M.S. and Ph.D. Phone: (919) 941-9400. E-mail: apply@src.org. Homepage: http://www.src.org/student-center/fellowship.
chunks.question: Which degrees are eligible for SRC fellowships?

chunks.text: Department of Energy Computational Science Graduate Fellowships. DOE CSGF Program Coordinator, 1609 Golden Aspen Drive, Suite 101, Ames, IA 50010. Eligible Degree Program: PhD. only. Phone: (515) 956-3696. E-mail: csgf@krellinst.org. Fax: (515) 956-3699. Homepage: http://www.krellinst.org/csgf/.
chunks.question: What degree is required for DOE CSGF?

chunks.text: Fannie and John Hertz Foundation Fellowships. 2456 Research Drive, Livermore CA 94550-3850. Eligible Degree Program: PhD. only. Phone: (925) 373-1642 (8am-3pm Pacific Standard Time). E-mail: askhertz@hertzfoundation.org. Fax: (925) 373-6329. Homepage: http://www.hertzfoundation.org/.
chunks.question: Which degree is eligible for Hertz fellowships?

chunks.text: The Paul and Daisy Soros Fellowships for New Americans. 400 West 59th Street, 4th Floor, New York, NY 10019. Eligible Degree Programs: all graduate engineering programs. Phone: 212-547-6926. E-mail: pdsoros_fellows@sorosny.org. Homepage: http://www.pdsoros.org.
chunks.question: Who are Soros fellowships for?

chunks.text: Symantec Graduate Fellowship Program. The application is online only. The focus of the program is on information security, availability, and integrity. It is open to international students. E-mail: SRLFellowship@Symantec.com. Eligible Degree Program: PhD. only. Homepage: https://www.symantec.com/about/careers/graduate-fellowship.
chunks.question: What is Symantec fellowship's focus?

chunks.text: Natural Sciences and Engineering Research Council (NSERC) Postgraduate Scholarships (PGS D or M). Scholarships and Fellowships Division, 350 Albert St., Ottawa ON, CANADA K1A 1H5. Eligible Degree Programs: Master’s or Ph.D. Phone: (613) 995-4273. E-mail: schol@nserc.ca. Homepage: http://www.nserc-crsng.gc.ca/Students-Etudiants/PG-CS/BellandPostgrad-BelletSuperieures_eng.asp.
chunks.question: Which degrees are eligible for NSERC scholarships?
